payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: So, as the last episode wound down and friendships were strengthened, you all then began to ponder about what you wanted to do with the time before you. And today we return approximately one year after we left off. So, we met earlier this week to discuss this. We went through a various number of things you wanted to accomplish, both as individuals and some of you in groups. So we're going to go ahead and go over those elements for you guys and get everyone up to speed with what exactly has transpired in this year period of time.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it's just this face is printed, and just having your wife eventually come up to me and having you go--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I might have enough that we can all wear one one night. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty, then, without further ado, let's jump into tonight's episode of Critical Role. [dramatic music]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And welcome back, everyone. So, last we left off, Vox Machina, having completed a multitude of various quests over a prolonged period of time, found themselves free of immediate necessity and danger.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Brought peace to the world forever.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Nothing bad will ever happen again.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Now you do. She passed that information on to you. All right. So. That's the truncated example of Grog's year. We might come back to it here in a minute. Next up would be Pike, because that's a good transition point there. So, what'd you do?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Which actually plays into her opening. The other thing you did, which happens towards the end of the year, is you said you went to the Frostweald.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I did, yeah. I was curious about the werewolves. So I went to go see the nymph in the frozen lake. You know, the one that's all about Grog.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: So I had a conversation with her, and I felt really bad because I wasn't as affectionate as last time, so I gave her this palm-sized ruby that was at the bottom of the bag. Looked really pretty, so I gave it to her.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: She did. We hit it off. And I asked her if the werewolves were just in the Feywild. Turns out--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Lycanthropy is scattered throughout the planes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, I didn't fucking know that.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: And he can write a full sentence over a short rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm the second champion under Grog.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And as everyone was pitting both of you against each other for another championship bout, you both decided to--

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: We didn't end up doing it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yep. ASHLEY -- and we knew both of us were just too powerful--

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: -- and I would win. So we just decided not to do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Two monsters of a feather stay in leather.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Two monsters of a feather. Also, in that time, which was a five-month period, we had a lot of lessons and taught Grog how to read.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can slowly read four- to five-letter words.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Five-letter words is a big deal!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He knows how to write his name now.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yeah. You're having a Teleportation Circle placed within your estate in Whitestone, and at the end of the year it's still two weeks out from creation. So it's going to take a little while longer, but it is in the process.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. I also built my house!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes! New house, new house! And built up the guard. And I made a nice little animal sanctuary for Trinket, a nice garden area for him to hang out in, and other wildlife should they so desire. Oh, and Tary, Tary moved in.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I didn't have a place to stay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And I have such a large house, you might as well just come and live over here, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, I mean, if you'll have me.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I can sleep on a couch.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, no, no, you'll have your own room.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Excellent, because I don't think I could sleep on a couch. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, you! And I became, for Whitestone, the ambassador to Syngorn. So I'm working on making a Teleportation Circle, is that what they're called?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It's not like you have to make the armor, you commission the armor. You enchanted it for five months.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I made friendship bracelets, she worked on her alchemy. So--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, yeah. It was great. It was great. And he made dragon armor.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I was just making that fuckin' armor. (laughter)

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay, and since you were the last of one of the intertwined events, the four of you-- Keyleth, Vax, Vex, and Pike-- all took a specific trip.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I made friendship bracelets, she worked on her alchemy. So--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, yeah. It was great. It was great. And he made dragon armor.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I was just making that fuckin' armor. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's not like you have to make the armor, you commission the armor. You enchanted it for five months.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Took trips with Vax, and had him as my right-hand man.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And thus, another meme was built. (laughter)

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: (laughs) So after searching for a few days, up northward in the forest where you recall seeing portions of the tree-- canopy line shifting and seemingly vanishing and then reappearing, you eventually stumbled upon a large, wooden structure-- circular and tall, almost like a giant crown of wood, it sat there-- and noticed that the mists that hugged the base of this marsh, as it's slowly recovering since Sondur fell. Still thick marshland, but not quite as disgusting and corrupt as it once was. The mists that clouded this area were all gathering towards this wooden structure, and you begin to see shapes in the mist. Heads. Faces. Bodies. And you begin to realize that these were all spirits of the marsh being summoned to this structure. You all went, disguised as various small flying insects-- or beast creatures-- and managed to stealth into the entrance doors, into this mossy marsh-rotted wood structure, and on the inside saw the mist form an audience, within the inside of this Globe Theatre-like structure, upon which the central platform remained. A strange, crystalline spark began to form upon that stage, where a doorway opened and then, stepping from it, a half-dozen elvish-looking figures, though their skin is pale white-gray, their eyes white and iris-less, their limbs lithe and thinner and longer than elves you're used to seeing in your experience. And, while none of you could understand-- or most of you could understand the language except for Keyleth and Taryon, I think it was?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And thus, another meme was built. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, and since you were the last of one of the intertwined events, the four of you-- Keyleth, Vax, Vex, and Pike-- all took a specific trip.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'm sorry, Tary came along too. So the five of you guys took a journey into the Feywild in search of the Theatre.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It was amazing-- I wasn't there, but it was amazing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: They integrated rap, too. It was like--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it was like a whole new way to tell history. It was just so good.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Once, and then takes a short rest to reload.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The door itself is also a crest.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, the crest of Vox Machina, right on his chest, emblazoned there. His arm works a little differently, his right arm, which we might see in some sort of competition at some point. And his left arm, thanks to Percival Fredrickstein von Mussel de something.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He's got a little hole right here in his hand, that--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You're gonna pay for that, oh my God, I can feel the radiation.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It can't be for anything else. Anything else won't compare. Just change it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: But it can fire a shot, a bullet shot. I've never used it before, but it can shoot something.

payload.raw_text: Awesome. All right. So as the months go by and you all have your individual adventures, as you converse and talk amongst yourselves, the date of Winter's Crest begins to creep up. Now, Winter's Crest is a day that's really only celebrated in Tal'Dorei proper-- occasionally by people in other places who migrated away from Tal'Dorei, but the event that it's based around, Eravon the Ice Lord, was specific to Tal'Dorei. It's not celebrated everywhere in the world. However, it is coming up, and you all decided to celebrate your Winter's Crest festival this year, not in Tal'Dorei. You all instead made your way towards the Bay of Gifts, in Marquet.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Are you back? You were gone?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: All right, is that the end of that?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: And I wrote. A lot.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Yes.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Just a lot of writing, and I'm probably halfway through that book by now.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Awesome. All right. So as the months go by and you all have your individual adventures, as you converse and talk amongst yourselves, the date of Winter's Crest begins to creep up. Now, Winter's Crest is a day that's really only celebrated in Tal'Dorei proper-- occasionally by people in other places who migrated away from Tal'Dorei, but the event that it's based around, Eravon the Ice Lord, was specific to Tal'Dorei. It's not celebrated everywhere in the world. However, it is coming up, and you all decided to celebrate your Winter's Crest festival this year, not in Tal'Dorei. You all instead made your way towards the Bay of Gifts, in Marquet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You know we have a fucking flying carpet?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Now we have two brooms. We can leave those fuckers in the dust!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You really have no money left.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I am out of money. I have a teeny bit left. But I also bought some other things.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: He's now going to become Whitestone's FedEx though.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Are we all getting any prezzies?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Are you back? You were gone?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, is that the end of that?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Just a lot of writing, and I'm probably halfway through that book by now.

payload.trigger_phrase: you make your way to Emon
payload.raw_text: I don't know what those are. All right, so you make your way to Emon, then you charter a ship across the Ozmit Sea and make your way to the continent of Marquet. On the northeast base of the Aggrad Mountains of Marquet, which consume a sizable portion of the continent's north shore, there before you stands, as it comes across the horizon, a brilliant crescent-shaped bay of white sands, glittering clear turquoise-colored waters, and the grandiose port city of Shamal.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: And show us all the best gifs.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns_last5.text: Okay. (laughter)

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns_last5.text: I'll show you all the best jifs.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: That's okay too. That's okay too.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns_last5.text: Okay, just kidding. I don't say that.

payload.raw_text: Hundreds of ships fill the bay, from small fishing vessels to massive cargo ships, bringing an ever-flowing mixture of cultures, goods, and characters from across Exandria to its sunny location. Now, while back home Winter's Crest brings seasonal rain and snow, here in the Bay of Gifts the sky is clear, the water is warm, and the sun is ever-shining throughout the day. The streets of the city are draped in white and gold silks, affixed and framing crossways and street corners between torch posts and buildings. The distant sound of waves and seagulls cawing seems to envelop the city at all hours, occasionally stemmed by the sounds of localized musicians. So as you arrived here about midday or so, you take in the nice salty air into your lungs. You have your belongings, your sacks at your side, the city is bustling. What do you want to do with your vacation?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: (sings) Shamal. (laughter)

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Sorry.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: Holy crap.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns_last5.text: God damn it.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns_last5.text: Oh, man.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Ten days?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Ah, I am Guath, and this is for all of you? I will have to charge for your friend, I am sorry."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, well, he's not really a person, but--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "You're lucky I'm not charging twice! He's a very big guy. That goes for that one as well."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Then he won't order food! But he's going to sleep somewhere, yes?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well then, is he okay with staying out on the beach?"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Doty? Are you okay with staying on the beach?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Okay, very well. So that would be ba-da-da-- seven and a half? Seven, we'll go with seven. How long do you plan to stay?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: A couple of weeks, a week? Something like that.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Let me see here." And he brings up this small abacus and starts doing math really quickly on the side you see. "Nine days, you said?"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, well, he's not really a person, but--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "You're lucky I'm not charging twice! He's a very big guy. That goes for that one as well."

preceding_turns.text: "Then he won't order food! But he's going to sleep somewhere, yes?"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Doty? Are you okay with staying on the beach?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Okay, very well. So that would be ba-da-da-- seven and a half? Seven, we'll go with seven. How long do you plan to stay?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: A couple of weeks, a week? Something like that.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We'll get bored after eight or nine.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I know what he's about to do to me right now. I know what Matt's going to do.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Ten days, all right. We'll put that at an even-- with discount for friendships, 1500 gold for the entire stay."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Then he won't order food! But he's going to sleep somewhere, yes?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well then, is he okay with staying out on the beach?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We'll get bored after eight or nine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Let me see here." And he brings up this small abacus and starts doing math really quickly on the side you see. "Nine days, you said?"

payload.raw_text: You spend the next hour asking from person to person on these white sands.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Let's go find my armor. I'm going to go look around for it.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Make a survival check, because you're now tracking.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Survival? Ten.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Ten.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Oh, no. That's a four, so that's three. I'm a negative one for survival. I thought it was 11.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You spend the next hour asking from person to person on these white sands.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: All the way up to the head this time.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Up to the neck. You feel the sunburn is starting to kick in a bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (sighs) I need that helmet, Doty! My helm, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The giant reflective piece of metal?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You're going to cook in that thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Don't tell me "Tary!" Your number one job is to take care of me, and your number two job is to take care of my belongings! That stuff is worth more than you!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All right, just get me out of the hole.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I hand him a seashell. I'm sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's go find my armor. I'm going to go look around for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a survival check, because you're now tracking.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, no. That's a four, so that's three. I'm a negative one for survival. I thought it was 11.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay, so as you guys come in at the close of the day-- you've been here for a few days as part of your excursion here-- you all come in as you've had enough time in the sun and you probably need to get out for a little bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And by the way, I went to the front desk and I asked which room Mr. de Rolo was staying in, because I wanted to put some of his belongings there, and I hid the armor in Percy and Vex's room.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You'd better have been able to actually convince them.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Which is what I'm about to get to. Make a deception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Sure. Here's where the Luck is. Yeah. Persuasion, you say?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 20. Okay, it takes a little bit of convincing, but eventually he sends one of the employees to go along with you. They let you into the room.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And now I'm coming back to the beach.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right. You guys ask around about a half an hour or so, and you're led to one location that is windowless and has an open archway door with some fine purple and red silks blocking the entry. As you walk inside, there's one woman who's sitting there, in the process of eating a small bowl of fruit. You see she is a dark-skinned Marquesian, but elf lineage. She has elven features. Her hair, which is this dirty brown, is braided in rows that go down past her waist and have a series of multi-colored, looks almost like gems and rings and other cool pieces of jewelry that are woven into it. As she's looking at this small book in her lap and eating the fruit, she turns around. "Oh, I'm sorry. Hello."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: There's food in there. Eat it all. Scratch through everything you want.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They both start eating. They go nuts on the place.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And use this as your latrine as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: One of them goes, (sniffs) and just pisses on one of the sacks. You're not quite sure which one it is.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Good doggy. All right. You're free now. Go away. I don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Do you leave them in the room?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, just stay here, go, whatever you want. I don't know. I feel weird. I don't need a pet right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You leave and close the door behind you? Okay. All right, so you guys meet up again. You get more drinks, you begin to wander the city. Is there anything else you want to do while you're out and about for the afternoon?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I want to get my hair braided with beads on the end! (cheering)

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It's still a lot. But since you've gotten here, you get the sense that it's-- by nature, everything here costs a little more. A lot of it's imported and a lot of it is designed for people that are willing to pay for foreign goods.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, for the two? For any sort of masculine hair endeavors, which is not our specialty-- Well, the beads themselves are made from finely blown glass and they're individually colored, and those are made specifically by an artisan who is about three blocks up that way, so those are brought here, and those are purchased on our end, as well. You are paying straight cost of the beads. Time and training, of course, on our end, and we do the finest work you'll find all across Marquet."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Well, you know what? I am a very big supporter of small businesses, so support small business, and I will give you 120 gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "The 20 is mainly for him. The 100 was to give you the dye coloring--"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, it's for both of you guys? Oh, I thought it was 120 each!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's not bad. I mean, that's a lot.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right. Okay. So upon completion-- It's very cool. It's pretty close to what you were hoping and expecting. You end up with three streaks: one central one that goes from the center, and then two that go from the sides and back that way.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, it's for both of you guys? Oh, I thought it was 120 each!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA

preceding_turns.text: It's still a lot. But since you've gotten here, you get the sense that it's-- by nature, everything here costs a little more. A lot of it's imported and a lot of it is designed for people that are willing to pay for foreign goods.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, she owns the business so you don't have to do as much.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Very well. So how much blue did you want to get in your hair?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: How much blue did you want to get in your hair?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Just some strips, you know. Just some strips on the white so it pops out.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: You know, dealer's choice. Just get creative and do what you want.

payload.trigger_phrase: Over the course of the evening
payload.raw_text: Okay. Over the course of the evening, the room gets cleaned as best as it can.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns_last5.text: I know you have to fiddle your dangle. I'm well aware.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: All right, I'll be right there to give him more specific instructions.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns_last5.text: We're going to sleep.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: I'm coming.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Do you improve the reception by moving it around?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. Over the course of the evening, the room gets cleaned as best as it can.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Your things are being brought out in pieces, but the two employees see Doty enter and set them down and Doty starts picking things up and dusts them off. Starts picking up the piles of dog feces.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He's throwing the dung out onto the beach. Starts heading back.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I should have been more specific.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I don't think he's very sanitary.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This is my earring, by the way.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This is how I have to talk with it. I have to dangle it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I know you have to fiddle your dangle. I'm well aware.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All right, I'll be right there to give him more specific instructions.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Do you improve the reception by moving it around?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: So you guys all get settled and you find your way to your rooms. The afternoon comes to a close for the evening, and everyone's gone off to do their business and prepare for a dinner, we'll say, in about an hour.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Welcome back, everybody, to Critical Role. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: First and foremost, our winner in the chat room goes by the name of Makelovelikewar, congratulations! Congratulations. You won the box. We've all signed it, and it'll be coming to you in the near future. Make sure to contact the folks who run the chat here, and they'll get your information, and well done. All righty, so. Bringing us back in. You guys have been travelling across the Silvercut Roadway, through the dividing plains of Tal'Dorei, onwards to the Alabaster Sierras, and eventually to the homestead of Whitestone. You guys have made your way back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We catch up on so much gossip.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) So you arrive. What do you want to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, actually, now that we're home, I would like to try and find Pike once we're in and settled.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: We'll say for the point of the narrative, a couple of weeks go by, relatively unimpactful.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, I want it. I really want it. It's real important to me.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Who did you make the promise to?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Well, you live your life how you want to--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh. Ooh. No, your promise was different. You said 'alone' so if I was like really, (distressed noise) I need to, I come to you--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Thanks. You're sure you don't want to just, like, slide one out and just take a look at it?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That was like watching an eight-year-old juggle a gun. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: They both want to do it so bad.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Moving on from that scene before they change their mind.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yeah, sure. So you walk on down to the center of Whitestone, which is now far more full of life and bustling. A lot of the buildings that line the square have little flower boxes underneath the windows. Color has returned to it. Still keeps moody gray skies a large portion of the day, but overall the city itself seems to have sprung into life over the past year or so. The Sun Tree is beautiful. It's still a vastly bark-visible tree. It has that orange-brown color across it, smooth in most places, a little more textured toward the bottom, but you see the very lush green leaves up into the boughs. You can see little bits of white flowers that year-round reside up in the top. It stands there before you in all of its magnificence.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Thanks. You're sure you don't want to just, like, slide one out and just take a look at it?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That was like watching an eight-year-old juggle a gun. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: They both want to do it so bad.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Moving on from that scene before they change their mind.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We'll say for the point of the narrative, a couple of weeks go by, relatively unimpactful.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, the Teleportation Circle is complete.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hey, guys. We can go to Syngorn whenever we want.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: The question is, do we want to?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I go check in with the Sun Tree while I'm here?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "It's been a while."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I come up and say, hey, Sun Tree. Casting Speak With Plants, of course.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: They did not see that. So, as you're brought to the western road, it leads you alongside the shops and one of the guard who's talking to you is like, "Yeah, sorry. A group of folks have been here for a couple of days asking-- a few hours, I should say. Not a couple of days. Asking about you. We've kept an eye on them. They don't seem to be aggressive, but they asked for you recently, and we managed to find you by the bakery. Here they are." They lead you to the outside of the town, and there you see a small carriage with two horses that are currently hitched up front. You see about three other Pale Guard in full armor. One of them is in the middle of conversation with a couple of figures. You see four figures. You see three, and then a fourth one emerges from inside the carriage. It's a topped carriage with what looks to be some sort of curtains that are closed-- reds and dark purples. It doesn't look like an elaborate carriage, but it's functional. You see a male gnome with short dark hair, slicked to one side, and a well-groomed mustache that curls at the end. He's in the middle of talking when he glances over and sees you and goes, "Aha! She's here!" He leaps off the top and the guards get defensive as he goes, "Astra! Ogden! JB? She's here!" Then he goes rushing off in your direction as the guards are like, "Sir! Sir!" He ignores them for a second, and the two guards with you say, "Miss Pike, should we?" And they go for their blades.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Rolling really shitty tonight. Let's see what happens. Oh, that's good! That's much better. Straight perception? 30.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. As you're walking away from the Sun Tree and begin heading back to the northern side of Whitestone, glancing back at him. "Oh, it's good to talk to him again." And you see Pike walking with two guards just on the southwestern side of the square. She looks a little nervous.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's about that time I'm like, okay, bye, Sun Tree. And then I'm going to Beast Shape into a crow and start circling her.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There are two kids off to the side that were just playing who look over and go, "Whoa."

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: He approaches real fast and goes, (laughs) and gives a big old hug and lifts you off the ground, and it takes you a minute to realize, this is Johann Trickfoot, your cousin who you haven't seen in quite a long time. He's dressed in a fine vest that is a dark maroon color with a gold trim. A little ragged at the edges, but fine. Big, swishy pants and boots, and he lifts you up for a second and then sets you back down and is like, "It's been quite a while."

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: He approaches real fast and goes, (laughs) and gives a big old hug and lifts you off the ground, and it takes you a minute to realize, this is Johann Trickfoot, your cousin who you haven't seen in quite a long time. He's dressed in a fine vest that is a dark maroon color with a gold trim. A little ragged at the edges, but fine. Big, swishy pants and boots, and he lifts you up for a second and then sets you back down and is like, "It's been quite a while."

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Yes." Johann claps his arm on the side of your shoulder. "Yes, of course! It's been-- I can't even remember. Look at how big you are! Last I saw you, you were waist-high to a knuckle-punch. It's been far too long. And so strong!" He's slapping the side of your arm, and they're all doing the whole family gathering, pulling and tugging, and you're starting to feel uncomfortable from all the attention, and the guards are all confused but also mildly amused by this family gathering. The old one now catches up, and you recognize that this is your uncle Ogden Trickfoot, who is the father to both Johann and JB. As he approaches, he has this small walking cane and he's walking at an angle because he doesn't quite see you. He's like, "Are you sure that she's around?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: JB. She's another one of your cousins. One that you grew up with, actually, when you were very young, but you haven't seen her in a very long time. As they all begin to approach, this small cluster of Trickfoots have approached. As JB walks up to answer Johann, says, "Yes, indeed. We've heard all about you. I've been so proud to hear that you've done such great good in the world, cousin."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I give her a hug. It's good to see you. It's been a very long time.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Did you guys just come here to see me?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Yes." Johann claps his arm on the side of your shoulder. "Yes, of course! It's been-- I can't even remember. Look at how big you are! Last I saw you, you were waist-high to a knuckle-punch. It's been far too long. And so strong!" He's slapping the side of your arm, and they're all doing the whole family gathering, pulling and tugging, and you're starting to feel uncomfortable from all the attention, and the guards are all confused but also mildly amused by this family gathering. The old one now catches up, and you recognize that this is your uncle Ogden Trickfoot, who is the father to both Johann and JB. As he approaches, he has this small walking cane and he's walking at an angle because he doesn't quite see you. He's like, "Are you sure that she's around?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: JB. She's another one of your cousins. One that you grew up with, actually, when you were very young, but you haven't seen her in a very long time. As they all begin to approach, this small cluster of Trickfoots have approached. As JB walks up to answer Johann, says, "Yes, indeed. We've heard all about you. I've been so proud to hear that you've done such great good in the world, cousin."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I give her a hug. It's good to see you. It's been a very long time.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Did you guys just come here to see me?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Very well." And the three guards that were at the front shout out, "The carriage?" And Johann goes, "Oh, yes! Well, it's now under the watch of one Pike Trickfoot, so just put it wherever the royal horses go." (chuckles)

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh. Well, no one right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh. Shouldn't be a problem. Or woman. Whatever, I don't know. You can tell me later."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: We'll discuss later, maybe, but do come in. I would love to introduce you to some friends of mine. Come into town.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: JB's smile creeps, and you see the gap in her teeth once more. "Are these friends Vox Machina?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At which point, they all look at her, and she goes, "I'm so excited. Please?" And they all gather around you, and the guard comes up real fast. "Miss, do you require assistance?"

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Just walk us into town. That would be great. Just in case there's anything that might jump out and get us.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Occasionally has to right his face, and it's getting caught in the beard a little bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I don't know that at all. What?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. I guess she wanted a change of pace. She had dark hair when she was younger.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Astra, free treats!" And they start grabbing and filling their pockets with blondies and eating them in between.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I've got more. Sure. You can take all you want. Everything in the store is yours.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You watch as JB walks up with long, dark hair, and goes, "Do you happen to have any water?"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Of course! Doty, go fetch some water for these fine gnomes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Tary." Grabs and gets a small bucket of water and sets it down. You watch as JB begins breaking up the pastry and dipping it in the water and then feeding it to the uncle.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Johann and Astra turn their heads to JB, and JB goes, "Well, I'm keeping tabs on what you've been doing. There had been word that you not only helped with the reconstruction of Emon, but you've also been traveling to and from Whitestone since the Conclave attacked the continent, so we narrowed it down between a few possibilities, and based on the fact that you, Percival-- this is your city, is that correct? We figured that given that basis, we had a good chance. We passed through Westruun and could not find you. Wilhand, however, did say that you're doing well, and we eventually made our way east, and here we are. It's good to see you."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm sorry. What brings you fine folk into town? Are you just visiting Pike here?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Astra goes, "Well, we travel a lot and we've heard of exploits in various towns all around. I just have not had the chance to meet Pike after all the stories I've heard, and Johann speaks of her often, and JB is pretty much obsessed with your exploits." JB's over there. "I've been keeping tabs." "So we were surprised that we were located by a courier who gave us your letter and your absolutely unnecessary but very appreciated donation to the family, and we thought it would be nice and right of us to come and thank you in person."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Well, I'm so glad you did. How in the world did you find out that I was here?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Johann pops up and goes, "We're always passing through, my dear, but we figured we'd just stay for a few days. However long it takes to get to know you a little better, and then we'll be on our way."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do me next. What have I done?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "You're Grog Strongjaw. Yes. You're the one that apparently replaced me."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "You grew up together once we were not, and you're a strong half-giant of a man. The beard confuses me, but you've done many great things, I suppose. The rest of you, it is an honor to meet you. I've heard so much, and it's rare you get to meet heroes in your lifetime." (shouting) "What? I'm still hungry!"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: They're so nice. I feel terrible.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Are you guys just passing through? Where's your next destination?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: His head spins for a second. He smiles, and in Gnomish back to you, he says, "Oh. It's been a while."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: It's so good to see you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Thank you. You're a good one." He puts his glasses back on and reaches out, and JB picks up a stick and hands it to him. He's like, "Thank you."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Does it look like he really needs that cane?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You want to make an insight check? (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Kick the cane out, see what happens. Do you need this? Boom!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I think it looks like he really needs it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You genuinely feel bad for even having that second thought. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I do. I feel really terrible.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: In my broken Gnome, I tell him  it's an honor to mate you. (laughter)

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As this conversation's happening, there's a small bowl of what looks to be some of the pork, but it's been soaked in some water or wine, and it's been mashed or pre-chewed. You're not quite sure. But you have the spoon there, and you have Uncle Ogden sitting there going--

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Well, I'm sure she would love to talk to you. She's very inviting, very friendly.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Okay." She gets up from the table. Johann's still talking. He's telling stories. "We Trickfoots. For generations, we've been problem-solvers. We rove from place to place, solving problems across the countrysides. If you have a squeaky wheel, we fix the wheel. If you have a squeaky door, we fix the door."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "If you have a squeaky tax man, we fix the tax man. That's a joke! That's a joke. You can laugh. See, there you are."

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Do you understand Undercommon? Okay, then yeah. He looks back and goes, "It's been travel. They take care of me. We're here now." His hand reaches over and grabs your hand and holds it for a second. He goes, "We're here now to protect you."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As this conversation's happening, there's a small bowl of what looks to be some of the pork, but it's been soaked in some water or wine, and it's been mashed or pre-chewed. You're not quite sure. But you have the spoon there, and you have Uncle Ogden sitting there going--

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I start speaking to him in Underdark because I haven't spoken that in a while. Ogden? How are you liking traveling with everybody? With Johann and Astra and JB?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: His ear perks up a little bit and he goes, "I haven't heard that talk in a long time." His head turns slightly towards you, but he's still looking off a little bit from under the glasses.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Astra met Johann about ten years ago. He needed someone to nail him down. Spry, wily, prone to terrible choices. He's a stupid boy. Stupid, stupid boy." At which point, Johann, who's been talking, stops and goes, in Undercommon, "I can hear you, Dad. Anyway!" "She's good to him. If she breaks his heart, I'll kill her."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "They come often, and the dreams that come often generally come to pass. There is a curse in our blood, and we wish to save you from that curse." His fingers tighten a little bit on your hand. Not in a painful way, but an emphatic hold. "I'm worried for you. You're the only good one." His hand releases your hand. He drools a little bit and wipes it with his hand. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I take a spoon of peanut butter. It's a little bit easier. Here you go.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It dribbles out a little bit. "Unexpected."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Sorry, the mix between the pork and peanut butter. It's an interesting mix, but it's Grog's favorite.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Can you tell me about Astra? How did she come into the picture?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You see Astra, who's been drinking deep of one of the two fine bottles of red wine, is drunkenly leaning with her arm around Johann's arm. He's a little tipsy, but he's still in conversation, talking to Grog. He's telling embarrassing story after embarrassing story, and since you're so eager and no one else really wants to pay him as much mind. He's talking to the table, but he's mainly focusing on you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can see that she stiffens up a little bit. "So he's already told you."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I don't want to ruin an evening that's going so well, but he's had visions. I'm worried about you. When we got your letter that-- we didn't know how to find you. We didn't think that you were in the area. When your letter found us, we thought maybe you weren't that far away, so we began to search our way along the Silver Cut."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Can I insight check her again?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I can't figure out what's going on. Ugh, balls. Oh, wait. 16?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She's hard to read, in general. Even when she was a kid, she was an odd duck. She seems genuine.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Well, how's everybody feeling? Are you tired? Are you full? Is it bedtime? What's going on?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I could talk to these people all night long.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: But if we should turn in?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As Johann picks up Astra. "Anyway, it's been a fantastic meal. I appreciate your hospitality, and I look forward to this grand tour you promised tomorrow."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: They all have a giant birthmark on their face. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you've been paying attention to them most of dinner. Mannerisms, everything. There are some similarities.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. They're not direct family. They're cousins, uncle-- they're once removed from her central nuclear family. But you do see similarities in cheekbone structure, at least with Johann, Ogden, and JB. Moreso with JB. It's hard with the mustache with Johann. But there are some similarities between JB and Pike, and you can't help but envision these two cute little gnome children playing together. These two dark-haired female gnomes running around, and there may have been an age when they could have been hard to tell apart from each other.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You've been with Wilhand since you were very young. You said six. He's not been eager to talk about the family. You can see he resents the Trickfoot clan, so you haven't heard of this, but you also know very little about them.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This dream that the old one talked about, does that worry you?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: How do you know about that?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He does. He was listening in.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I actually talked to him a little bit about that, as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He said that there was a thing in your family. A blood curse. He seemed honest enough when he was saying it. Said that people paid the price for a slight someone made a long time ago, and certain members of your family are cursed, and he's had these premonitions, these dreams, before. It was his brother who passed away a long time ago.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You haven't because you haven't been with most of the Trickfoots for most of your life.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: He's in Westruun right now. It is also late in the evening.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Hang on. I don't mean to question everything, but Wilhand defected from the whole family and became a cleric, but he never mentioned anything of a curse? Why did he become a cleric?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That seems like a dichotomy there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It actually makes perfect sense to me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Or he's terrified of some superstitious curse. Maybe both?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We trust you, and Wilhand raised you, so Wilhand must have his head screwed on straight.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to say you're in a room of people who were raised by-- at least 60 percent of the time, ridiculous people who have their head screwed on straight.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Maybe we should ask him about it?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's where I was going. Is there any merit in trying to get a hold of Wilhand right now, while they're here?
